faqs.question: What are your rates?
faqs.answer: Cloudy to Clear charges $110 per hour with a minimum of 4 hours per session. Garages and storage areas are $125 per hour.

faqs.question: How long will it take to organize my home?
faqs.answer: It depends on the scope of the project. During the free consultation, Claudia will assess your space and provide a realistic timeline.

faqs.question: Will you force me to discard my belongings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. Every decision is yours. Claudia will never pressure you to part with anything you are not ready to release.

faqs.question: Do you offer virtual organizing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Virtual organizing sessions are available via Zoom, WhatsApp, or FaceTime.

faqs.question: Does pricing include organizing products?
faqs.answer: No. The hourly and package rates cover Claudia's time and expertise. Organizing products are purchased separately.
